    ✓ AC2: returns income * 0.10 for income of exactly $10,000 (bracket starts inclusive)

    ✓ AC3: returns income * 0.10 for income of $30,000 (mid bracket)
    ✓ AC4: returns income * 0.10 for income of exactly $50,000 (still 10% bracket)
    ✓ AC5: returns income * 0.25 for income of $50,001 (first dollar of 25% bracket)

    ✓ AC6: returns income * 0.40 for income of $150,001 (first dollar of 40% bracket) (1 ms)

    ✓ AC8: throws TaxError with code INVALID_INCOME for a negative income
    ✓ AC8: throws TaxError with code INVALID_INCOME for a large negative income
